sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ سَارَةُ أَنْ تَبْدَأَ مَشْرُوعَهَا الصَّغِيرَ مِنَ الْمَنْزِلِ.
sentences.translation: Sara je odlučila pokrenuti svoj mali projekat od kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Sarah decided to start her small project from home.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تُصَمِّمُ مَلَابِسَ جَمِيلَةً وَتَبِيعُهَا عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Ona dizajnira lijepu odjeću i prodaje je putem interneta.
sentences.translationEn: She designs beautiful clothes and sells them online.

sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِتَكْبِيرِ تِجَارَتِهَا الْخَاصَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan naporno radi kako bi proširila svoj vlastiti biznis.
sentences.translationEn: She works hard every day to grow her own business.
